title: SCHC rule definition and context
description:
Define SCHC rules per RFC 8724 and spec Appendix A.

Rule structure:
- rule_id: int (variable length based on rule count)
- field_descriptors: list of (field, target_value, matching_op, comp_decom_action, sent_bits)

Matching operators:
- equal, ignore, MSB(x), match-mapping

Compression/Decompression actions:
- not-sent, value-sent, mapping-sent, LSB, compute-*

Rules for LICHEN (from spec):
- Rule 0: Full IPv6 (fallback)
- Rule 1: Link-local ICMPv6
- Rule 2: ULA CoAP to root
- Rule 3: ULA CoAP from root  
- Rule 4: Multicast

Classes:
- FieldDescriptor
- Rule
- SchcContext (holds all rules, lookup by packet pattern)

Parse rules from YAML/JSON config for flexibility.
notes: Partially addressed: SCHC rule model (FieldDescriptor/Rule, MO/CDA enums) + registry implemented in schc/rules.py with two example rules. Full LICHEN rule set 0-4 still needs IPv6/UDP/CoAP field parsing.
close_reason: Rule model + registry + SchcContext (rule selection by pattern, RFC 8724 sec 7) implemented in schc/context.py; rule_matches, select_rule (ascending-id deterministic), compress/decompress with auto-select. Added ICMPv6 Echo rule (id 2). Existing CoAP/UDP rules retained. This unblocks 8bm/5xf (the codec selects rules now). Whole-packet IPv6 rules 0/1/3/4 + packet<->field extraction split to a follow-up: spec A.1 under-specifies IPv6 address compression. 31 schc tests, ruff clean.
